results.rendered_html: 1. sattrāyaṇa (sattra + ayana) n. eine Feier von besonders langer Dauer  ŚAT. BR. 4,6,8,2 .  AIT. BR. 6,22 .  PAÑCAV. BR. 25,3,4 . 7,3 . 8,2 . 16,3 .  Ind. St. 3,382 . 390 . 393 . atha yatsattrāyaṇamityācakṣate brahmacaryameva tadbrahmacaryeṇa hyeva sata ātmanastrāṇaṃ vindate  CHĀND. UP. 8,5,2 .
